Source: Einstein GenAI Overview
URL: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/einstein/genai/overview
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Einstein GenAI Overview

Page rendered as JavaScript-heavy application (LWR framework). Content is dynamically loaded and not present in raw HTML source. Available structural indicators:
- Part of Agentforce and Generative AI documentation section
- Links to developer guide, API references, and SDKs
- Integrates with Salesforce Trust Layer for secure LLM access
- Technical infrastructure: LWR (Lightning Web Runtime) bootstrap with Google Tag Manager (GTM-MWZCN8), Sprig analytics (5% sampling), and Coveo search integration
- Environment: production deployment
